To find the **characteristic polynomial** of a matrix $ A $, we compute the determinant of $ A - \lambda I $, where $ I $ is the identity matrix of the same size as $ A $.

---

### Given Matrix:

$$
A = \begin{pmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8}
\end{pmatrix}
$$

We compute the determinant of:

$$
A - \lambda I = \begin{pmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{pmatrix}
$$

---

### Step 1: Compute the determinant

We compute the determinant of this 3×3 matrix. Let's denote:

$$
\begin{vmatrix}
a & b & c \\
d & e & f \\
g & h & i
\end{vmatrix}
= a(ei - fh) - b(di - fg) + c(dh - eg)
$$

Substituting the values:

$$
\begin{vmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{vmatrix}
$$

Let’s compute this determinant step by step.
